t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我可能被人跟踪了。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>I think someone's following me.</color>

t_ch: 玩得还开心吗，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: Did you have fun, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 不，我的直觉没错…那女孩果然不简单。
t_en: No, my intuition was right... That girl is definitely not what she seems.

t_ch: 现在，必须得小心了。
t_en: Now, I need to be extra careful.

t_ch: 啊…他来了！
t_en: Ah... He's coming our way!

t_ch: 哟，这不是我忠实的大顾客——{NICKNAME}嘛！
t_en: Hey, well if it isn't my most loyal customer, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 真是好久不见啊，亲爱的！
t_en: It's been such a long time, old friend!

t_ch: 他又是谁？同伴吗……
t_en: And who's this? A companion...?

t_ch: 总觉得，场面越来越混乱了。
t_en: I feel like things are getting more and more chaotic.

t_ch: 好久不见，大明星。
t_en: Long time no see, superstar.

t_ch: 还有人……
t_en: There's someone else...

t_ch: 啊。
t_en: Oh.

t_ch: …舒翁女士？
t_en: ...Lady Siobhan?

t_ch: 依旧那么光芒四射啊，远远瞧见一眼，就知道是你了。
t_en: Still radiant as ever. I could spot you from a mile away.

t_ch: 来打个招呼，你在这做什么呢？
t_en: I came over to say hi. What brings you here?

t_ch: （太引人注意，果然不是好事……）
t_en: (Drawing too much attention is never a good thing...)

t_ch: 喔，让我想起那句熟悉的格言：「远远看着聚光灯下的人，会觉得她魅力无穷……」
t_en: Oh, reminds me of that old saying: "From afar, anyone under the spotlight seems endlessly charming..."

t_ch: 「但只有走近了，才知道那颗心多么魂不守舍。」
t_en: "But only when you get close do you realize how restless that heart truly is."

t_ch: 让你见笑了。我只是出来散散心…谐乐大典举办在即，多少有些紧张。
t_en: Sorry you had to see that. I just came out to clear my head... The Charmony Festival is coming up soon, and I'm a bit nervous.

t_ch: 嗓音的事，我听说了。有空来惊梦酒吧，我帮你看看是怎么回事。
t_en: I heard about your voice issue. Drop by the Dreamjolt Hostelry when you're free, and I'll take a look at what's going on.

t_ch: 多谢。没想到，时至今日，我仍要麻烦舒翁女士。
t_en: Thanks. I never thought even after all this time, I'd still be troubling you, Lady Siobhan.

t_ch: 看来你是挺紧张的，跟我说话都这么端着了。
t_en: You must be pretty nervous if you're being this formal with me.

t_ch: 看来我说中了？来吧，二位——让我老桑博带你们好好体验一下大人的世界！
t_en: Looks like my analysis is spot-on. Follow me, you two. Let me give you a taste of the adult world!

t_ch: （恐怕得先走一步了……）
t_en: (I'm afraid I'll have to take my leave...)

t_ch: 我会登门拜访的，只是现在……
t_en: I'll come visit you properly, it's just that right now...

t_ch: 需要些私人时间，我明白。那就约好了，改天见，大明星。
t_en: You need some alone time, I get it. It's a date then, catch you later, superstar.

t_ch: 嗯，一言为定。
t_en: Mm-hmm, it's a deal.

t_ch: 对了，毕竟是「谐乐大典」——用人们的话说，你会为「同谐」献唱。
t_en: Right, it is the Charmony Festival after all. As people say, you'll be performing for the Harmony.

t_ch: 还记得么？某次巡演前，我问过你一个问题。算算时间，也过去很久了，不知道你有没有找到答案——
t_en: Remember? Before one of your tours, I asked you a question. It's been quite a while since then. I wonder if you found your answer...

t_ch: 知更鸟，你是为了什么而歌唱？
t_en: Robin, what do you sing for?

t_ch: 我想，我已经有答案了。
t_en: I think I've got my answer now.

t_ch: 但比起言语，我更想用歌声来回答。这样才更有说服力吧？
t_en: But instead of words, I'd rather answer with a song. That would be more convincing, no?

t_ch: 相比一个笃定的回答，这倒令人更加信服。期待你的演出。
t_en: That's actually more convincing than a straight answer. Looking forward to your performance.

t_ch: 舒翁离开了……
t_en: Siobhan has left...

t_ch: 抱歉，舒翁女士。如果有时间，我们本该好好聊聊的……
t_en: Sorry, Lady Siobhan. If there was more time, we could have had a proper chat...

t_ch: 现在，先办正事吧。
t_en: Now, let's get down to business.

t_ch: 咦，杂音消失了？
t_en: Huh? The static's gone?

t_ch: 这…他们走过了商业中心……
t_en: Hmm... they passed through the commercial district...

t_ch: 然后是皮皮西俱乐部……
t_en: Then past the Pepeshi Club...

t_ch: 再然后…声音就消失了。
t_en: And then... the voice just vanished.

t_ch: 难道她回到了现实？不应该，那里又没有出入口……
t_en: Did she return to reality? That can't be right. There's no entrance or exit there...

t_ch: 又出现了？比之前更遥远，这次是在……
t_en: Again? Further away than before. This time in...

t_ch: 筑梦边境？
t_en: Dream's Edge?

t_ch: 原来如此，是地下通道啊。
t_en: Oh, I get it now. It's the underground tunnel.

t_ch: 也对。早该想到，那里时常会有偷渡案件。是我粗心了，当时应该问问那两位猎犬的。
t_en: Right, makes sense. I should've known. That place is a hotspot for smuggling cases. I should've pressed those two Bloodhounds for answers back then.

t_ch: 无论如何，过去看看吧。
t_en: Anyway, I'll check it out.

t_ch: 到这里就无法追踪了。是因为梦境施工还没完成么？
t_en: Can't navigate any further from here. Is it because the Dreamscape construction isn't complete yet?

t_ch: 家族仍在一刻不停地编织美梦，匹诺康尼也向来不与外界交恶……
t_en: The Family never stops weaving their sweet dreams, and Penacony has always maintained good relationships with the outside world...

t_ch: 为何偏偏在这个时候，有人要图谋不轨？
t_en: Why would someone choose this moment, of all times, to plot something sinister?

t_ch: 劳驾，前方是——
t_en: Excuse me, ahead is...

t_ch: 前方是——知更鸟女士？！
t_en: Is that... Miss Robin!?

t_ch: 你好。
t_en: Hello.

t_ch: 没想到能在这遇见您！我、我刚加入猎犬家系的日子，正是您送来了家族问候。
t_en: I never thought I'd meet you here! When I joined the Bloodhound Family, you were the one who delivered The Family's greetings.

t_ch: 您肯定不记得我了。不，这么说太失礼，我还没资格……
t_en: You probably don't remember me. No, that's too rude of me to say, I'm not worthy...

t_ch: 我当然记得，洛卡先生。
t_en: Of course I remember you, Mr. Loka.

t_ch: 这，竟然……
t_en: This is... unbelievable...

t_ch: 我留在匹诺康尼的时间不多，能为「同谐」代劳的机会更少。只要愿意前往，我会事先熟悉每一个人——
t_en: I don't spend a lot of time in Penacony, and have even fewer chances to help out the Harmony. If I'm willing to go, I always make sure to get to know everyone beforehand...

t_ch: 毕竟家族的问候不能是场面话，得是真心诚意送给每一位家人的祝福。
t_en: After all, Family greetings can't be mere pleasantries. They must be heartfelt blessings for each and every family member.

t_ch: 知更鸟小姐…太光芒四射了……
t_en: Miss Robin... you're absolutely dazzling...

t_ch: 不过，您怎么会来筑梦边境？是有什么吩咐么？
t_en: By the way, what brings you to Dream's Edge? Do you have anything you need from us?

t_ch: 打扰了，您见过两位游客吗？都是灰发，其中一位…是戴着发卡的少女。
t_en: Pardon me, but have you seen two tourists? They both have gray hair, and one of them... is a young lady wearing a hair clip.

t_ch: 您是在找人吗？还真没印象…要不，我帮您留意留意？
t_en: You're looking for someone? I don't really recall seeing them... but I can keep an eye out for you if you'd like?

t_ch: 哦，这个……
t_en: Oh, well...

t_ch: 不必劳烦了。
t_en: Don't bother.
Ah...

t_ch: 星、星期日先生？您怎么也……
t_en: M—Mr. Sunday? What are you doing here...

t_ch: 听闻有人心术不正，我特地前来看看。
t_en: I heard someone's up to no good, so I came to check things out myself.

t_ch: 啊？我……
t_en: Huh? I...

t_ch: 开个玩笑，别紧张。知更鸟久未还乡，我特意带她来这边看看，追忆些童年旧事。
t_en: Just kidding, don't be so tense. Robin hasn't been home for a while, so I brought her here specifically to look around and reminisce about her childhood days.

t_ch: 至于方才提到的二位，是我们遇见的客人。{F#她们}{M#他们}遗落了些物品，我已经归还了。不必再向任何人探问。
t_en: As for those two mentioned earlier, they were guests we met. They left some items behind, which I've already returned. There's no need to ask anyone else about it.

t_ch: 明白。
t_en: Understood.

t_ch: 前方是施工重地，我们就不深入了。告辞。
t_en: There's a construction site ahead, so we won't go any further. Goodbye.

t_ch: 多谢啦，洛卡先生。
t_en: Thanks a lot, Mr. Loka.

t_ch: 刚才不便直言。知更鸟，你为何要来这里？
t_en: I couldn't speak freely earlier. Robin, why did you come here?

t_ch: 就像你说的，是来追忆一些旧事。
t_en: Like you said, I'm here to reminisce about old times.

t_ch: 你呢，你又为何而来？
t_en: What about you? What brings you here?

t_ch: 追查要犯本就是我的职责。
t_en: Tracking down criminals is my duty.

t_ch: 而你，我的妹妹…你从小就这么执拗，每到这时，我都会希望你从未拥有这项品质。
t_en: And you, my dear sister... you've always been this stubborn, and in times like these, I wish you never had this trait.

t_ch: 你听不进我的话，仍在擅自调查？
t_en: You're still investigating on your own, ignoring what I said?

t_ch: 是啊。我实在放心不下「死亡」，才一路追踪到这里。
t_en: Yeah. I can't stop thinking of "death," so I followed some people all the way here.

t_ch: 毕竟在朝露公馆，我亲眼看见了那副*惨状*。我做不到让你独自硬撑。
t_en: After all, I witnessed that horrific scene at the Dewlight Pavilion with my own eyes. I can't let you bear this burden alone.

t_ch: 是吗？<color=#dbc291ff>你看见了啊，那些身处美梦，却被「死亡」带走的家人。</color>
t_en: Oh? <color=#dbc291ff>So you saw them... those Family members who were in the sweet dream, yet "Death" took them away.</color>

t_ch: 嗯。我只看见资料凌乱地摆放在桌面上，但凡有半分余力，哥哥都不会容忍那种杂乱无章的景象。
t_en: Hmm. I only saw documents strewn on the table-top. If my brother had even an ounce of energy left, he would never have tolerated such a disorganized sight.

t_ch: 就像现在，如果不是为了从你口中问出真相……
t_en: Just like now, if it weren't for getting the truth out of you...

t_ch: 我也绝对不会容忍，你傲慢又无礼的伪装。
t_en: I absolutely won't tolerate your arrogant and disrespectful facade.

t_ch: 在说什么呢，亲爱的妹妹？
t_en: What are you talking about, dear sister?

t_ch: 「开个玩笑，别紧张」——但哥哥他，从来不会对陌生人开玩笑。
t_en: "Just kidding, don't be so tense"... but my brother never jokes around with strangers.

t_ch: 我亲眼看着他一一磨去自己的棱角，把它们藏到内心的最深处。
t_en: I watched as he smoothed away the sharp corners of himself, bit by bit, hiding them in the deepest corners of his heart.

t_ch: 别再冒犯我的兄长，否则——除去家族公事，你要再担上一份我的私怨了。
t_en: Stop insulting my elder brother, otherwise, you won't just be dealing with The Family... You'll be dealing with me, too.

t_ch: 哈哈哈……
t_en: Hahaha...

t_ch: 我还以为，你会喜欢我的「二次创作」呢。
t_en: And here I thought you'd enjoy my little creative spin I'd put on him.

t_ch: 不觉得那样的他，更讨人喜欢吗？
t_en: Don't you think he's more likeable that way?

t_ch: 在匹诺康尼冒充一位家主，想必你已做好了心理准备。
t_en: I trust you're mentally prepared to face the consequences of posing as a Family head on Penacony.

t_ch: 哎呀，我倒是没料到，会被一只小鸟套了话。
t_en: Geez, I didn't expect to get played by a little bird.

t_ch: 不过，你真觉得自己有能耐？想抓我的家伙多的是，鸡翅膀女孩，你又凭什么？
t_en: But do you really think you've got what it takes? There's no shortage of people trying to catch me, chicken-winged girlie. What makes you so special?

t_ch: 这里仍由五大家系管理，一路上，你也能看到有多少成员驻守。
t_en: This place is still governed by the Five Lineages, and along the way, you've seen how many of their members are stationed here.

t_ch: 更何况，在这梦境边缘，我也可以……
t_en: Besides, here at the edge of the dreamscape, I can also...

t_ch: 可以什么？觉得自己能拿回失去的力量？
t_en: What do you mean "can"? You think you can get your lost power back?

t_ch: 不得不说，你是很有天赋，才会被选中成为「谐乐大典」的调弦师。
t_en: I'll give credit where it's due. You must be quite talented to have been chosen as a Chordmaster for the Charmony Festival.

t_ch: 你也很聪明，几乎把一切都猜对了，唯独搞错了一件事——
t_en: You're also quite clever. You got almost everything right, except for one thing...

t_ch: 失声的小鸟，有没有一种可能，美梦从来都没有变。它之所以不再欢迎你，只是因为你「长大」了。
t_en: Silent little bird, have you considered that maybe your sweet dreams never changed at all? They just stopped welcoming you because you "grew up."

t_ch: 就像面具，一旦戴太久，就再也摘不下来。
t_en: Like a mask... Once you wear it for too long, you can never take it off again.

t_ch: 属于你的那一副，真的叫做「同谐」么？
t_en: As for that mask of yours... Is it really called the Harmony?

t_ch: 嗯？「秩序」的双子？
t_en: Hm? The twin of the Order?

t_ch: 人们都说，「知更鸟」维护领地时，总是连命都不在乎。没想到，这个名字还挺适合你。
t_en: You know what they say. Robins will fight tooth and nail to protect their territory, even at the cost of their own lives. Looks like that name suits you pretty well.

t_ch: 哦，算算时间，小灰毛也快完事了吧？花火大人，要赶下一场戏咯~
t_en: Oh, right on schedule. Gray Hair should be wrapping up soon! Miss Sparkle, time to head to the next scene!

t_ch: 出发出发。
t_en: Let's roll!

t_ch: …哎呀，本以为在梦境边缘，能瞒过你的眼睛的。看来主场就是主场，哪儿都躲不掉。
t_en: ...Oh my, I thought I could fool your eyes at the edge of the Dreamscape. But I guess there's no hiding from you on your home turf.

t_ch: 怎么，动了你的人，要找我算账？要不先坐下来谈谈呢，我看你也挺有耐心的。
t_en: What, you want to settle the score with me for messing with your people? Why don't we sit down and have a chat? You seem like a patient one to me.

t_ch: 所以，说说吧，你想从我这里…拿走什么？
t_en: So, tell me... what exactly do you want to take from me?

t_ch: 从刚才起，我就很在意……
t_en: I've been wondering about something from just now...

t_ch: 附近，似乎有一道微弱的「不协和音」。
t_en: There seems to be a faint "dissonance" nearby.

t_ch: 得靠近些，找个隐蔽的角落。
t_en: We need to get closer. Find a hidden spot.

t_ch: 如果是我误会了…事后，我会认真补偿。
t_en: If I'm wrong about this... I'll make it up to you properly afterward.

t_ch: 距离…好远。他们这是去哪儿了？
t_en: The distance... it's so far. Just where did they go?

t_ch: 无眠之夜的开端 你初次入梦的时刻
t_en: The beginning of the sleepless night, the moment you first entered the dream.

t_ch: 感觉如何，要稍作休息吗？
t_en: How are you feeling? Need to take a break?

t_ch: 知更鸟怎么样了？
t_en: How's Robin doing?

t_ch: 那名愚者杀死了她，而你曾经见过的遇害现场，也是由她伪造。
t_en: The Fool killed her, and the crime scene you witnessed was staged by her.

t_ch: 当然，匹诺康尼不存在真正的死亡。对知更鸟来说，这只是一次小小的波折。
t_en: Of course, there's no such thing as true death on Penacony. For Robin, this is just a minor setback.

t_ch: 形势比我记忆中更复杂…
t_en: Things are more complicated than I remember...

t_ch: 那片舞台名为「美梦」。每个人都各怀目的，希求将其实现。而愿望在交织与碰撞时，火花总是极为纷繁，令人难以看清。
t_en: That stage is called the "sweet dream." Everyone upon it carries their own desires, striving to see them fulfilled. Yet when those desires intertwine and collide, the sparks that fly are dazzling, and clarity itself becomes obscured.

t_ch: 我没事，继续吧。
t_en: I'm fine, let's continue.

t_ch: 在此之前，我还有一个问题。我们也算相处了一段时间，此时此刻，你对我的感觉怎么样？
t_en: Before we continue, I have one more question. We've spent some time together, so at this moment, how do you feel about me?

t_ch: 挺有感觉的，怎么了？
t_en: I feel pretty good, why, what's wrong?

t_ch: 还真令人…心花怒放。可惜，我指的不是这种感觉。
t_en: How... delightful. A pity, though, because that's not the kind of feeling I was thinking about.

t_ch: 什么感觉？
t_en: What feeling?

t_ch: 你愿意信任我到哪种程度？
t_en: How much are you willing to trust me?

t_ch: 事实上，我也曾出现在你的「记忆」里。而且，同样与匹诺康尼有关。
t_en: As a matter of fact, I've appeared in your "memories" before. And similarly, it was related to Penacony.

t_ch: 要看你做了些什么…
t_en: It depends on what you did...

t_ch: 正合我意，那么…我们继续吧。
t_en: That's exactly what I like to hear.... let's continue then.

t_ch: 要看你态度怎么样…
t_en: It depends on your attitude...

t_ch: 以我的标准…还算不错？口说无凭，我们继续吧。到那时，如果你仍然无法信任我，我会留下足够的时间…无论何种责难，我都能够接受。
t_en: By my measure... it's not bad at all. But talk is cheap, so let's keep going. When the time comes, if you still can't trust me, I'll give you plenty of time... I can take whatever criticism comes my way.

t_ch: 不妨顺着方才的思绪，再次深入其中……
t_en: Let's follow that train of thought and delve deeper...

t_ch: 你在筑梦边境的经历，连我也无从知晓。询问流萤时，她不愿回答。
t_en: Even I don't know about your experiences in Dream's Edge. When I asked Firefly about it, she declined to give an answer.

t_ch: 但从她的神情来看，我相信…那是一段只属于你们两人的，美好而又难忘的时光。
t_en: But judging from her expression, I believe... it must have been a beautiful and unforgettable time that belonged to just the two of you.

t_ch: 而花火也不是只为取乐而来，她是星核猎手的合作者。
t_en: And Sparkle wasn't just here for fun. She's in cahoots with the Stellaron Hunters.

t_ch: 她伪装成你的故人，用尽各种手段，暗示梦境的真相。最后，干脆直接将你们送入了梦境深处。
t_en: She disguised herself as someone from your past, using every means possible to hint at the truth of the dreamscape. In the end, she simply sent you both deep into the dreamscape.

t_ch: 多么好心的愚者啊，「钟表匠」米哈伊尔的过去，也因此被你和流萤掀开了一角。
t_en: What a kind-hearted Fool she was. Thanks to her, you and Firefly managed to uncover a piece of Watchmaker Mikhail's past.

t_ch: 而在那之中，也潜藏着危险。
t_en: And the dangers that lurk within.

t_ch: 忆域迷因，「何物朝向死亡」。至少在那时，你误以为它很危险。
t_en: A Memory Zone Meme, "Something Unto Death." At least back then, you mistakenly thought it was dangerous.

t_ch: 在一位…姑且形容为优雅吧。这位优雅的忆者女士，帮助你们逃离了那里。但仓促间，你和流萤就此失散。而她接下来的经历，或许和你记忆中存在出入。
t_en: With the help of a... let's say "graceful" Memokeeper lady, you managed to escape from there. But in the rush, you and Firefly got separated. And her experiences afterward might differ from what you remember.

t_ch: 那时，我也同样在场。
t_en: I was there at that time too.

t_ch: …别怕，我接住你了。感觉还好吗？
t_en: ...Don't worry, I've got you. How are you feeling?

t_ch: 猛然穿过忆质，总要经历一阵恍惚。那位忆者心思不太单纯呢，她有能力将你们一齐送走，却刻意将你留了下来。
t_en: Passing through memoria so suddenly always leaves you in a daze. That Memokeeper had ulterior motives. She could have sent all of you away, but deliberately kept you behind.

t_ch: 刚才那是怎么回事？
t_en: What happened just now?

t_ch: 是忆域迷因，匹诺康尼有些传说提到过它，并把它称为「死亡」。我捕捉到了一些不同寻常之处，但没来得及看清。
t_en: It's a Memory Zone Meme. Some Penaconian legends mentioned it and called it "Death." I caught something unusual, but couldn't get a clear look at it.

t_ch: 但我看到了。在它准备行凶的瞬间，它的瞳孔当中，出现了「另一片梦境」的倒影。与十二时刻有些相似，气氛却完全不同。
t_en: But I saw it. In that instant before it was about to strike, a reflection of another dreamscape appeared in its pupils. It was somewhat similar to the Twelve Hours, yet the atmosphere was completely different.

t_ch: 美梦中不存在「死亡」——如果说，这不是一句谎言呢？所谓的死亡，只是让我们沉入更深的梦境。
t_en: What if "Death" doesn't exist in sweet dreams... or so they say. But what if that's not a lie? Perhaps death is just sinking into a deeper dreamscape.

t_ch: 可惜，来了位多管闲事的忆者。下次再见面，交给我就好，我得…让她享受一段刻骨铭心的时光。
t_en: Too bad, a nosy Memokeeper had to show up. Next time we meet, leave it to me. I'll... give her an experience she won't soon forget.

t_ch: 每次这么说，享受的人，好像都是你自己吧。这一次，还是别太过火了。
t_en: Every time you say that, it's always you who seems to be having fun. This time, try not to go overboard.

t_ch: 也不算什么坏事，就算我真的迎来死亡，也没机会再告诉他们真相。{F#她们}{M#他们}还在附近吗？
t_en: It's not necessarily a bad thing. If I really do meet my end, I won't have a chance to tell them the truth anyway. Are they still around?

t_ch: 我感知不到，恐怕返回现实了吧？
t_en: I can't sense them anymore. I'm afraid they must have gone back to reality.

t_ch: …稍等。
t_en: ...Hold on.

t_ch: 还是不行，在原始梦境里，总是联络不上银狼。
t_en: Still no good. I can't get in touch with Silver Wolf in the Primordial Dreamscape.

t_ch: 我给她留了言，如果她能收到，会帮忙引导{NICKNAME}回到这里。
t_en: I left her a message. If she gets it, she'll help guide {NICKNAME} back here.

t_ch: 或者，我们也先回现实一趟，联系上银狼再说。
t_en: Or we could head back to reality first and get in touch with Silver Wolf.

t_ch: 别急，此时贸然穿越梦境，要比之前危险许多。
t_en: Hold on, recklessly crossing through the dreamscape now would be far more dangerous than before.

t_ch: …怎么了？
t_en: ...What's the matter?

t_ch: 「死亡」闹出的动静太大，那位{RUBY_B#「梦主」歌斐木}在美梦中无所不能的存在{RUBY_E#}，也将视线投向这里了。
t_en: "Death" caused such a huge commotion that the {RUBY_B#"Dreammaster" Gopher Wood}omnipotent being within the sweet dream{RUBY_E#} has turned its gaze upon this place.

t_ch: 那我们岂不是……
t_en: Then aren't we...

t_ch: 一时半会还不会有事，「死亡」吸引着他的注意，只要我们小心些，就不会暴露。
t_en: We should be fine for now. "Death" has his attention, as long as we are careful, we won't be exposed.

t_ch: 甚至…在这片梦境中，我们有机会找到反击他的手段。
t_en: In fact... within this dreamscape, we might find a way to strike back against him.

t_ch: 嗯，在你到来前，我先去搜集了一些情报。就我所知，他曾将自己<color=#dbc291ff>最为阴暗的罪行</color>掩埋于此。
t_en: Mm-hmm, before you arrived, I did some digging around. From what I've learned, he buried his <color=#dbc291ff>darkest crimes</color> right here.

t_ch: 无论那是什么，我相信，总会起到作用。在他们回来之前，不妨去找找看。
t_en: Whatever it is, I believe it'll be of some use. Let's go look for it before they come back.

t_ch: 看附近的痕迹，是「死亡」下的手。可它们…竟然真的死去了？
t_en: From the traces nearby, it was "Death's" doing. But they... did they really die?

t_ch: 不，你的猜想没错。只是，这些鸟儿不受另一片梦境欢迎。
t_en: No, your conjecture is right. It's just that these birds weren't welcome in another dreamscape.

t_ch: 你见过它们？
t_en: You've seen them before?

t_ch: 见过，可这反倒耐人寻味，战果和我预想中全然相反。
t_en: Yes, but that's what makes this so intriguing. The outcome of the battle was the complete opposite of what I expected.

t_ch: 对了，有件很重要的事，我似乎还从没问过——
t_en: That reminds me, there's something important I still haven't asked you yet...

t_ch: 你想不想，和我死在一起？
t_en: Would you like to die together with me?

t_ch: 今…天吗？还是不必了吧。
t_en: T—Today? Not really.

t_ch: 我就喜欢你猝不及防的样子，很可爱。
t_en: I just love catching you off guard like that. It's adorable.

t_ch: 那…稍微走开几步吧，我有一些猜想。会有些风险，如果发生了什么，不必管我。
t_en: Then... take a few steps back. I have a few conjectures. There might be some risk... If anything happens, don't worry about me.

t_ch: 你这是……
t_en: What are you...

t_ch: 果然如此。
t_en: Just as I thought.

t_ch: 所以发生了什么？
t_en: So, what happened?

t_ch: 这些乌鸫，正是<color=#dbc291ff>「梦主」歌斐木的化身，那位在美梦中无所不能的存在</color>。在他面前，「死亡」不该拥有反抗之力。
t_en: These ravens are <color=#dbc291ff>the incarnation of the Dreammaster Gopher Wood, that omnipotent being in the sweet dream</color>. In front of him, even "Death" has no strength to resist.

t_ch: 我刚才释放的力量，已经足以被他察觉，降下致死一击，但我们却安然无恙。
t_en: The power I just released should have been enough for him to notice and deliver a fatal blow, yet here we are, completely unharmed.

t_ch: …有时候，你和刃还挺像。我是说…在可能死去的时候。
t_en: ...You know, you're quite similar to Blade sometimes. I mean... when you're staring death in the face.

t_ch: 我可不是带着如释重负的心情，我是在享受…一生仅有一次的刺激。
t_en: It's not relief I feel. I'm savoring... a once-in-a-lifetime thrill.

t_ch: 我如果也只是一次就好了。
t_en: If only it was just once for me too.

t_ch: 不过，真的是他？我记得，很久之前的一场暴乱中，梦主的身躯已被焚毁，如今只能在美梦中延续生命。
t_en: But was it really him? If I remember correctly, the Dreammaster's body was burned to ashes in a riot long ago, and he can now only sustain his life within the sweet dream.

t_ch: 不仅如此，在漫长的时光中，他已将自身与匹诺康尼的每一寸土地融汇。
t_en: Not only that, over the long passage of time, he has merged himself with every inch of Penacony's land.

t_ch: 「梦主」二字，不是说他掌控了梦境——而是已让梦境本身，化作自己的第二副躯壳。
t_en: The title "Dreammaster" doesn't mean he merely controls the dreamscape. Rather, it means he has already turned the dreamscape itself into his second body.

t_ch: 极端情况下，他恐怕能将整个匹诺康尼付之一炬——但愿他不会舍得。
t_en: In extreme cases, he could probably burn all of Penacony to the ground... Though hopefully he wouldn't have the heart to do it.

t_ch: 看来动作越快越好。
t_en: We better act fast.

t_ch: 别急，眼下我们安然无恙。或许他并非不想，而是暂且不能为难我们呢？
t_en: Easy now, we're safe for the time being. Maybe it's not that he doesn't want to act against us, but rather that he can't. At least not yet?

t_ch: 近来歌斐木自称抱恙，从未在十二时刻现身。偏偏就在最近，他又在梦境深处，掩埋了自己<color=#dbc291ff>最为阴暗的罪行</color>。
t_en: Lately, Gopher Wood has been claiming to be ill, never appearing in the Twelve Hours. Yet just recently, he buried his <color=#dbc291ff>darkest crime</color> deep within the dreamscape.

t_ch: 你是说，掩埋这桩罪行，让他付出了很大的代价，让全知全能出现了缺陷…倒是很有可能。会和「钟表匠的遗产」有关吗？
t_en: So you're saying that burying this crime took a heavy toll on him, leaving a flaw in his supposed omniscience and omnipotence... That does sound plausible. Could it have something to do with the Watchmaker's Legacy?

t_ch: 我不那么认为，毕竟，那秘密被冠上了「最为阴暗」的形容。也或许…「遗产」并非仅有一份。走吧，去亲眼看看，我们就能知道了。
t_en: I don't think so. After all, that secret was branded as "the darkest." And perhaps... the "Legacy" is not one alone. Only by seeing it for ourselves can we know.

t_ch: 任何人都会犯下的错误——总为秘密设下重重警戒，反倒因此露出破绽。
t_en: A mistake anyone could make... Setting up layer upon layer of security around a secret only ends up exposing its flaws.

t_ch: 要来试试吗，多积攒些面对迷因的经验？
t_en: Why don't we give it a shot, and build up some experience dealing with memes?

t_ch: 不会有什么新经验的，我会启动「火萤IV型」，速战速决。
t_en: There won't be any new experiences. I'll activate Fyrefly Type-IV and end this quickly.

t_ch: 真可惜——我更乐意看到你陷入窘境，然后对我更加依赖。
t_en: What a pity. I would've much preferred to see you in a pinch, so you'd have to rely on me all the more.

t_ch: 就是这里吗，一个入口？
t_en: Is this it? An entrance?

t_ch: 只是伪装成一个入口。那道裂痕并非通往别处，而是一把记忆之锁，钥匙，则是承载特定记忆的一枚光锥。
t_en: It only looks like an entrance. That crack doesn't lead anywhere. It's a lock of memories, and the key is a Light Cone carrying specific memories.

t_ch: 显然，歌斐木得到过忆者的帮助——那枚光锥不在我们手中，恐怕要无功而返了。
t_en: Clearly, Gopher Wood had help from a Memokeeper, and since that Light Cone isn't in our hands, I fear we'll be returning empty-handed.

t_ch: 完全没有其他办法？
t_en: Is there really no other way?

t_ch: 可以碰碰运气，说不定协助歌斐木的忆者，和我有类似的习惯。
t_en: We could try our luck. Perhaps the Memokeeper helping Gopher Wood shares the same habits as me.

t_ch: 我来找找看吧，别抱太大希望。
t_en: I'll take a look, but don't get your hopes up.

t_ch: 看来我们运气不错，附近果然有他们的「备用手段」。
t_en: Looks like we're in luck. We've found one of their "contingencies."

t_ch: 你有过类似的记忆吗？始终不愿忘却，无数次回想的一段时光。
t_en: Do you have memories like that? A moment in time you never want to forget, one that you find yourself reliving over and over again.

t_ch: 当然…而且不止一段。
t_en: Of course... and more than just one.

t_ch: 真可惜啊。
t_en: What a shame.

t_ch: 别多心，我只是在模仿某些惹人厌烦的忆者。在他们看来，一段记忆被回想得越多，就越容易面目全非。
t_en: Don't take it to heart, I'm just imitating those annoying Memokeepers. In their view, the more a memory is recalled, the more likely it is to become distorted beyond recognition.

t_ch: 每次回忆，你都可能篡改它的面目。借此，他们强调着光锥的必要性。多么可悲啊，从未明白过，越是永恒的事物，越会引发毁灭的欲望。
t_en: Each time you recall a memory, you risk distorting its true face. That's how they justify the necessity of Light Cones. How tragic. They never understood the truth: The more eternal a thing, the more it stirs the desire to destroy it.

t_ch: 但具体到现在，他们倒是没说错。即使歌斐木亲自到来，也必须带上特定的光锥。他自己的记忆，已经不再可靠。
t_en: But they weren't wrong about the present situation. Even if Gopher Wood were to come in person, he'd need to bring a specific Light Cone. His own memories can no longer be trusted.

t_ch: 正是为了避免这一可能，我们眼前，才会存在「备用手段」。
t_en: That's exactly why we have a "contingency" plan right in front of us.

t_ch: 可从刚才开始，我就什么都没看到……
t_en: But I haven't seen anything since just now...

t_ch: 噢…抱歉。
t_en: Oh... sorry.

t_ch: 在这里面，想必存有某种「温和的刺激」，让他能在此时将记忆找回，以免遭到篡改。
t_en: Inside here, there must be some kind of "gentle trigger" that would help him recover his memories before they are subjected to distortion.

t_ch: 可这对我们来说，应该毫无意义。能让他触景生情的事物，在我们眼中，只会莫名其妙。
t_en: But for us, that's probably meaningless. Whatever triggers his memories would just seem bizarre and random to us.

t_ch: 不过，还是进去看看吧，总归能多获得一些线索。
t_en: Still, let's go take a look inside. We might pick up some clues at least.

t_ch: 没错，请吧，一切行动都将带来喜悦……
t_en: That's right. Go ahead. Every action brings joy...

t_ch: 还有「代价」。
t_en: And a "price" to pay.

t_ch: 怎么会……
t_en: How can this be...

t_ch: AR…<unbreak>214</unbreak>…真的是你吗……
t_en: AR... <unbreak>214</unbreak>... Is that really you...

t_ch: 你…不必勉强，我可以代劳。
t_en: You... don't have to force yourself. I can take care of it.

t_ch: 不，没关系……
t_en: No, it's okay...

t_ch: 潜入匹诺康尼时，你见到的也是她吗？
t_en: Was it her that you saw when infiltrating Penacony?

t_ch: 是，她正在清剿虫群。但那只是忆质，很快就消失了。银狼说过，匹诺康尼也曾遭遇过虫灾，我一直试着告诉自己，她只是在路过时伸出了援手。
t_en: Yes, I saw her fighting off the Swarm. But it was just memoria, and it vanished quickly. Silver Wolf mentioned that Penacony had also faced a Swarm invasion before. I kept telling myself that she was just passing by and lending a helping hand.

t_ch: 在一切结束后，她已经安然无恙地离开了。
t_en: And after everything was over, she had already left safe and sound.

t_ch: 那么这一次，你还想知道答案吗？
t_en: So this time, do you still want to know the answer?

t_ch: 会有什么不同吗？我很想听你告诉我…这也只是忆质而已，并非真实。
t_en: Would it be any different? I really want you to tell me... that this is not real. It's just memoria.

t_ch: 可冷静想想，那什么也无法改变，记忆…终究是已经发生过的事。
t_en: But thinking about it calmly, nothing can change it. A memory... is ultimately something that's already happened.

t_ch: …你比我想象中镇定。
t_en: ...You're more composed than I expected.

t_ch: 我宁可不是这样。
t_en: I wish I wasn't like this.

t_ch: 我和她…应该能被称为朋友。我更希望为她大哭一场，像所有普通人那样，为她感到悲伤。
t_en: She and I... we could be called friends. I wish I could just break down and cry for her, like any normal person would, to mourn her loss.

t_ch: 可浮现在我脑海里的，却是那样一句话——
t_en: But what surfaced in my mind was that one sentence...

t_ch: 这是我们早已注定的命运，总有一天，我也要迎来相同的结局。
t_en: This is our predestined fate, and one day, I too shall meet the same end.

t_ch: 「总有一天」。
t_en: "One day."

t_ch: 嗯，不是今天。虽然为时已晚，但也有其他事，我能为她去做。
t_en: Hmm, not today. Though it's already too late, there are still other things I can do for her.

t_ch: 也许你该先去静一静，很遗憾，这并非忆质，而是真正的格拉默铁骑。显而易见，匹诺康尼是她生命的最后一站。
t_en: Maybe you should calm down first. Unfortunately, this isn't memoria, but a real Glamoth Knight. Clearly, Penacony was her final destination.

t_ch: 她能够来到匹诺康尼，已经令我很惊讶了。
t_en: I'm surprised she made it to Penacony at all.

t_ch: 哦？是「格拉默军规」？她违背过那些禁令？
t_en: Oh? The Glamoth Regulations? She broke those prohibitions?

t_ch: 更严重，她是格拉默铁骑第一位，也是唯一一位「叛逃者」。那时帝国仍未覆灭，但她不想接受战死的命运，独自离开了。她说…想要自己选择如何死去。
t_en: Worse than that, she was the first and only "deserter" of the Glamoth Iron Cavalry. The Empire hadn't fallen yet, but she didn't want to accept a fate of dying in battle, so she left on her own. She said... she wanted to choose how she would die.

t_ch: 我们有过一次短暂的告别…但我没有阻止她，我做不到。离开格拉默帝国，本身就会让她迅速失去生命。
t_en: We had a brief farewell... but I didn't stop her, I couldn't... Leaving the Glamoth Empire itself would quickly drain her life away.

t_ch: 既然我们无法改变结果，我又为什么，要阻止她选择过程呢？
t_en: If we can't change the outcome, why should I stop her from making her own choice?

t_ch: 迅速死去…噢，「失熵症」？
t_en: Quickly drain her life away... oh, Entropy Loss Syndrome?

t_ch: 嗯，就像我一样——「未经允许，严禁脱离驾驶舱；存活的骑士应主动归队」，这些不仅仅是军规，也是我们延续生命的条件。
t_en: Yes, just like me. "Leaving the cockpit without permission is strictly prohibited. Surviving knights must actively return to formation." These aren't just military regulations. They're the terms of our survival.

t_ch: 除了驾驶「火萤IV型」以外，我都必须呆在休眠舱里。否则，失熵症会进一步恶化。
t_en: When not piloting the Fyrefly Type IV, I must stay in the cryosleep pod. Otherwise, my Entropy Loss Syndrome will only get worse.

t_ch: 原因呢，现在你有眉目了吗？
t_en: So, have you figured out the reason yet?

t_ch: 卡芙卡和{NICKNAME}找到我的那会儿，我刚刚结束了作为格拉默铁骑的……
t_en: When {NICKNAME} and Kafka found me, I had just finished my duties as a Glamoth Knight...

t_ch: …作为格拉默铁骑的最后一战。
t_en: ...my final battle as a Glamoth Knight.

t_ch: 帝国就此覆灭，一切限制都不复存在，绿色的火焰第一次在我身上燃起…而我也第一次，接触到了格拉默铁骑真正的命途力量。
t_en: The Empire fell, and all restrictions vanished. For the first time, green flames ignited upon my body... and for the first time, I touched the true Path power that the Glamoth knights wield.

t_ch: 那时我才明白——<color=#dbc291ff>失熵症是名为{RUBY_B#繁育}「活着」{RUBY_E#}的死亡。</color>
t_en: That's when I realized... <color=#dbc291ff>Entropy Loss Syndrome is a death called {RUBY_B#Propagation}living{RUBY_E#}.</color>

t_ch: 繁育？那才是格拉默铁骑的力量来源？
t_en: The Propagation? That's the true source of the Glamoth Iron Cavalry's power?

t_ch: 是啊，我曾见过这样的情景——在归属的王虫死后，虫群会彻底失去活力，陷入沉寂。
t_en: Yes, I've seen it happen. When the Swarm King dies, the Swarm completely loses its vitality and falls into silence.

t_ch: 和格拉默铁骑一样，它们没有被赋予自我，「离群」的那一刻，就已经死去。失熵症，也是如此。
t_en: Just like Glamoth's Iron Cavalry, they weren't given a sense of self. The moment they stray from the "hive," they're already dead. The same goes for Entropy Loss Syndrome.

t_ch: 能帮我带她离开吗？我不想让她独自留下。
t_en: Could you help me take her away? I don't want to leave her here alone.

t_ch: 在一切结束后，我想将她好好安葬，像普通人那样。
t_en: After all this is over, I want to give her a proper burial, just like any normal person.

t_ch: 乐意效劳。
t_en: I'm happy to help.

t_ch: 她想要逃离命运，最终，却还是在匹诺康尼与虫群抗争至死。命运的可憎，正因它不容抗辩。
t_en: She wanted to escape her fate, but in the end, she died fighting against the Swarm in Penacony. The detestable thing about destiny is that it brooks no defiance.

t_ch: 你知道她的名字吗？
t_en: Do you know her name?

t_ch: 分别时，她还没有名字，就像曾经的我。但我希望…离开世界时，她已经找到了——无论名字，还是生存的理由。
t_en: When we parted, she had no name, just like me. But I hope... by the time she leaves this world, she will have found both a name and a purpose for her life.

t_ch: 歌斐木将她留在这里，究竟是为了什么呢？他正在筹划的一切，无论怎么想，也无法与「繁育」产生联想。
t_en: Why did Gopher Wood leave her here? No matter how much I think about it, everything he's scheming couldn't possibly be connected to the Propagation.

t_ch: 你的过去，又与这里产生了多深的关联？
t_en: How deeply is your past intertwined with this place?

t_ch: 现在还不清楚，但很明显，她身上有许多处足以致死的伤痕——她绝不是失熵而死。
t_en: It's not clear yet, but obviously, she had multiple fatal wounds on her body... she definitely didn't die from entropy loss.

t_ch: 出发前，卡芙卡对我说过：在她看来，梦原本就是「过去」的交汇，每个人都一样，无论你多么不想面对，也无论你想要得到什么，都无法绕开——或许她说得对。
t_en: Before we left, Kafka told me: in her view, dreams are inherently a "convergence of the past." It's the same for everyone, no matter how much you want to avoid it, no matter what you're seeking, you can't avoid it. Perhaps she was right.

t_ch: 不过，梦主的虚弱，也给我们带来了机会。
t_en: However, the Dreammaster's weakness has also given us an opportunity.

t_ch: 不错，接下来……
t_en: Good, now then...

t_ch: 哦？有个好消息，这片梦境，似乎多了几位闯入者呢。看来，银狼偶尔还是能收到这里的讯息。
t_en: Oh? Good news. It seems like we've got a few intruders in this dreamscape. Looks like Silver Wolf can still pick up signals from here after all.

t_ch: 好快……
t_en: That was fast...

t_ch: 是那位忆者在进行指引吧，要么是忘了分寸，要么…就是心怀叵测呢。
t_en: Must be that Memokeeper's guidance. Either she's lost her sense of restraint, or... got something nasty up her sleeve.

t_ch: 走吧，我们去看看。
t_en: Let's go check it out.

t_ch: 你…应该没有隐瞒些什么吧？
t_en: You... aren't hiding anything, are you?

t_ch: 太好了，{F#她}{M#他}也没事……
t_en: Great, {F#s}he's okay too...

t_ch: 别着急，有位棘手的陌生人在。
t_en: Hold on, there's a troublesome stranger here.

t_ch: 有点眼熟，她是……
t_en: She looks familiar, she's...

t_ch: 哦？你竟然不知道？不考虑立场的话，她可比梦主更加危险。
t_en: Oh? You don't know? Setting allegiances aside, she's much more dangerous than the Dreammaster.

t_ch: 面对一位行于「虚无」的令使，无论何时何地，我们都应该小心翼翼。
t_en: When facing an Emanator who walks in the Nihility, we must always tread carefully, no matter when or where.

t_ch: 「虚无」的令使？！「剧本」中难道提起过她？
t_en: An Emanator of the Nihility!? Was she ever mentioned in the "script"?

t_ch: 不，若非「杀父之仇」，我也很难得知此事。
t_en: No, if it weren't for "my father's death," I wouldn't have known about this either.

t_ch: 两位来得正巧，这片梦境危机四伏。既然我们目的一致，不如结伴同行吧。
t_en: Your arrival is timely. This Dreamscape is fraught with danger. Since our destination is the same, how about we join forces?

t_ch: 我可以保护你们免受伤害，在忆域中，我也需要忆者的援助，以及…如果遇见家族，多一个人总能多一份解释。
t_en: I can protect you from harm, but in the Memory Zone, I'll need assistance from the Memokeeper as well. And... if we run into The Family, it wouldn't hurt to have one more person to explain the situation.

t_ch: 绝对不行，得把她和{NICKNAME}分开。
t_en: Absolutely not. We need to keep her away from {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 嘘——小心些。怎么了，此时此刻，{F#她们}{M#他们}的同行，给我们省去不少麻烦。
t_en: Shh... be careful. What's wrong? Right now, their journeying together is actually saving us a lot of trouble.

t_ch: 我感受到了，「死亡」已经再次投下阴影，就在这附近。不出意外，他们很快就会遇上。
t_en: I can sense it. "Death" has cast its shadow once again. It's close, and unless things change, they'll cross its path before long.

t_ch: 那位星核{F#女士}{M#先生}，显然还不熟悉忆质，而那只自负的天鹅，一向顾及体面，不愿出尽底牌。只有黄泉在场，{F#她们}{M#他们}才能跨过死亡。
t_en: That {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron is clearly unfamiliar with memoria, and that arrogant swan, always mindful of appearances, is unwilling to show all her cards. Only with Acheron present can they cross beyond death.

t_ch: 那我更应该现在去找{F#她们}{M#他们}，告知真相，没必要再一次和「死亡」爆发冲突。
t_en: Then all the more reason I should find them right now and tell them the truth. There's no need for another conflict with "Death."

t_ch: 可黑天鹅仍然在场，不知抱有什么目的。若是她选择颠倒黑白，你不可能说服其他人。在这里，忆者的话终究更可信。
t_en: But Black Swan is still here, with unknown intentions. If she chooses to twist the truth, you won't be able to convince the others. Here, a Memokeeper's word carries more weight.

t_ch: 不必急于一时，之后揭开真相也不迟。
t_en: No need to rush things. There's still time to reveal the truth later.

t_ch: 绝对不行，难道你忘了吗？作为星核猎手，我有一项不惜一切代价的「零点任务」——
t_en: Absolutely not! Have you forgotten? As a Stellaron Hunter, I have a "Zero-Point Mission," one that must be completed at any cost—

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>只要黄泉有半分拔刀的可能，我就不能让{NICKNAME}在场。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>If there's even the slightest chance that Acheron might draw her blade, I cannot let {NICKNAME} be there.</color>

t_ch: 哦，我以为你不会在意呢。为了责任而舍弃自我，你难道还没受够？
t_en: Oh, I thought you wouldn't care. Haven't you had enough of sacrificing yourself for duty?

t_ch: 我的梦…在开始时就注定破灭，但他们，还没到该醒来的时候。
t_en: My dream... was destined to shatter from the start, but for them, it's still not time to wake up.

t_ch: 可以再拜托你一件事吗？或许有一个两全其美的办法，但我必须先一步找到「死亡」。
t_en: Can I ask you for one more thing? There might be a way to have the best of both worlds, but I need to find "Death" before them.

t_ch: 这不难，它仍在这片区域徘徊，不过…两全其美？
t_en: That's not hard. It's still lingering in this Domain, but... a win-win solution?

t_ch: 现在我也拿不准，但是值得一试。也许它不是一直会抱有敌意，就算如此，启动「火萤IV型」后，我也能够迅速制服它。如果偏偏是最糟糕的情况……
t_en: I don't know for sure, but it's worth a shot. Maybe it's not always hostile, and even if it is, once I activate "Fyrefly Type IV," I can quickly subdue it. But if we're dealing with the worst-case scenario...

t_ch: 艾利欧曾说，我会在匹诺康尼经受三次死亡。而这「第一次死亡」…我想自己决定它如何到来。
t_en: Elio once said that I would face death three times in Penacony. And for this "first death"... I want to decide how it comes.

t_ch: 但愿你不是被刚才的重逢刺激到了。
t_en: I just hope that reunion a moment ago didn't rattle you.

t_ch: 去吧——我在忆质中烧出了一道孔洞，可以让你直接抵达迷因面前。动作可要快些，它未必会一直留在原地。
t_en: Go on ahead. I've burned a hole through the memoria that'll take you straight to the meme. Better hurry though, it might not stick around in one place for long.

t_ch: 我会的，多谢。
t_en: Got it, thank you.

t_ch: 这里也没有奇怪之处……
t_en: Nothing strange here either...

t_ch: 不对…它就在这里，要速战速决了。
t_en: Wait... it's right here. I need to end this quickly.

t_ch: …小心！附近有危险的气息。
t_en: ...Watch out! A dangerous presence lurks nearby.

t_ch: 这么快？来不及了，那只能……
t_en: Already? There's no time. Then I'll...

t_ch: 没事的，没事的，能自己选择如何死去，已经很棒啦。
t_en: It's fine, it's fine! At least I get to choose how to die. That alone is great.

t_ch: 而且，我可是在做梦，不会那么疼的。
t_en: Besides, this is just a dream, so it won't hurt that much.

t_ch: 这只是第一次死亡，我还有很多时间，去完成我们一起立下的约定。
t_en: This is just my first death. I still have plenty of time to fulfill the promise we made together.

t_ch: 接下来的事，你多少能回忆起一些吧？
t_en: You should be able to recall at least some of what comes next?

t_ch: 她希望用自己的「死亡」，为你展示梦境的真相。而在被贯穿的瞬间，虚无的令使也会有所顾忌，在拔刀时迟疑。这就是她选择的两全其美。
t_en: She hoped to reveal the truth of the dreamscape to you through her own "Death." At the moment she was impaled, even the Emanator of the Nihility would falter, blade wavering in hesitation. That was her way of securing the best of both worlds.

t_ch: 可惜，命运还是和她开了一个玩笑，忆质的转变如此迅速，她甚至没机会稍加说明。
t_en: Unfortunately, fate still played a cruel trick on her. The memoria transformed so quickly that she didn't even have a chance to explain.

t_ch: 在那之后，她抵达了流梦礁——一片流放之地，真正的匹诺康尼。以「死亡」作为理由，家族竭力隐藏着它的存在。
t_en: After that, she arrived at Dreamflux Reef... land of the exiles, the true Penacony. The Family went to great lengths to conceal its existence, using "Death" as their justification.

t_ch: 然而，那时她还无法安心深入。没能说明真相，让她此前忧心的情形仍在持续。她心急如焚地想要折返，将你带离战场。
t_en: However, at that time she still couldn't venture deeper with peace of mind. Unable to reveal the truth, the situation that had worried her before continued to persist. She was burning with anxiety to return and get you away from the battlefield.

t_ch: 幸运的是，一位温柔且热心的女士仍在注视着她——我再一次伸出了援手。
t_en: Fortunately, a kind and caring lady was still watching over her. I reached out to help once again.

t_ch: 她最担心的情形并未出现。「死亡」自行退去，你们得以全身而退。
t_en: Her worst fears didn't materialize. "Death" retreated on its own, allowing you all to escape unscathed.

t_ch: 此后，在黑天鹅的指引下，你试着查出流萤之死的真相。可是，你应该也注意到了，无论是与同伴断开联系，还是无法启动机甲的窘迫…
t_en: After that, guided by Black Swan, you tried to uncover the truth behind Firefly's death. However, as you must have noticed, be it losing contact with her companions, or the embarrassment of being unable to activate her mech...

t_ch: 那些忆质的虚像，分明是她从忆域潜入匹诺康尼时留下的。但这倒也无妨，那位黑天鹅犯下的错误，让流萤拥有了充分的时间。
t_en: Those memoria illusions were clearly left behind when she infiltrated Penacony from the Memory Zone. But that hardly matters. Because of Black Swan's blunder, Firefly gained the precious time she needed.

t_ch: 再次来到你们面前时，她已经用上了另一个身份。那次交手，搅动了命运的涡流，让许多人的道路就此交汇。而在你离去之后——
t_en: When she appeared before you again, she was already using a different identity. That encounter stirred the whirlpool of destiny, causing many paths to converge. And after you left...

t_ch: …猎手，你还会做梦么？
t_en: ...Do you still dream, hunter,

t_ch: 梦见那些因你而死的人？
t_en: of those slain by your hand?

t_ch: …「我的时候」？
t_en: ..."My time"?

t_ch: 我见过许多看似高明的伪装，能掩盖外表，但藏不住内心。你也不例外。
t_en: I've seen many clever disguises that can conceal appearances, but they can never cover up who a person really is. And you're no different.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你没想杀死{M#他}{F#她}。你出手只是为了驱散我和那位忆者…为什么？
t_en: You had no desire to kill {NICKNAME}. You only did what you did to drive me and the Memokeeper away... But why?

t_ch: 是「命运的奴隶」让你这么做？
t_en: Did Destiny's Slave make you do it?

t_ch: 你知道艾利欧。
t_en: You know Elio.

t_ch: 我以为这件事会写在你的「剧本」上。
t_en: I thought this is just the kind of thing that'd get written into your "script."

t_ch: 我的「剧本」向来只有几行。除此之外的，不必要，也不需要。
t_en: My "script" has always been brief. Other than that. Anything beyond that is unnecessary.

t_ch: 现在，该我提问了：你究竟是谁？
t_en: Now, it's my turn to ask: who exactly are you?

t_ch: 为何要「明知故问」呢？
t_en: Why ask when you already know the answer?

t_ch: 我时常会忘记一些事，因此比起回忆，更习惯用「感受」去捕捉些什么。所以——
t_en: I tend to forget things, which is why, rather than memories, I'm accustomed to using my emotions to capture what I normally wouldn't otherwise. So...

t_ch: ——我知道那冰冷的铠甲里是谁。
t_en: ...I know who is inside that cold armor.

t_ch: 因此，我也感受得到——你知道我是谁，也知道这把刀，知道它背后的…「意义」。
t_en: Therefore, I can sense it. You know who I am, you know this blade, and the... meaning that lies behind it.

t_ch: 怎么样，愿意脱下装甲谈谈了么？
t_en: How about it? Ready to take off that armor and sit down for a talk?

t_ch: 尚不是时候。
t_en: It's not yet time.

t_ch: 你不该知道那么多，迷路的自灭者。
t_en: You shouldn't know so much, lost Self-Annihilator.

t_ch: 我说过了…我的记性不太好，所以你不用担心。
t_en: Like I said... my memory isn't great, so you needn't worry.

t_ch: 接下来呢？{NICKNAME}被黑天鹅带走了，你要去找{M#他}{F#她}么？
t_en: What's next, then? {NICKNAME}'s been taken by Black Swan. Will you go look for {M#him?}{F#her?}

t_ch: 不必了…告诉你也无妨，在匹诺康尼，艾利欧给我的指示只有一条——「让星穹列车一同追逐『盛大的遗产』」。
t_en: No need for that... No harm in telling you. On Penacony, Elio only gave me one instruction: "Allow the Astral Express to pursue the Grand Legacy."

t_ch: 星穹列车不是你的敌人，如果你的目标是「钟表匠的遗产」，就去调查家族。他们不仅掩盖了「死亡」的存在，还埋藏了梦境的过去与真相。
t_en: The Astral Express is not your enemy. If your goal is the Watchmaker's Legacy, then go look into The Family. Not only are they covering up the existence of "Death," but they're burying the past and the truth about the dreamscape.

t_ch: 我已经在这么做了。
t_en: Already on it.

t_ch: 在分别前，我也送上一则忠告吧——
t_en: Before we part ways, let me give you a piece of advice...

t_ch: 无论你我行于怎样的道路，{RUBY_B#虚无}死亡{RUBY_E#}总是注定的终局。
t_en: No matter which path you and I walk, {RUBY_B#Nihility}death{RUBY_E#} is the inevitable finale.

t_ch: 即便在人世说出「永别」，在<color=#dbc291ff>「末王」再度登神之时</color>，我们仍会有最后一次重逢——在匹诺康尼，此事亦然。
t_en: Even if we say "farewell" in the mortal realm, we shall have one final reunion <color=#dbc291ff>when Terminus ascends to godhood once more</color>... and the same holds true on Penacony.

t_ch: …我已经到过流梦礁了，这不是一个很难揭开的秘密。
t_en: ...I've already been to the Dreamflux Reef. It's not a secret that's hard to uncover.

t_ch: …那么，很可惜，你还尚未知晓，自己多么「清醒」。
t_en: ...Well, I'm afraid you have yet to realize just how "awake" you truly are.

t_ch: 正因生命敢于沉睡，他们才能醒来。
t_en: It is precisely because life dares to slumber that they can awaken.

t_ch: 「再度登神」——就算{RUBY_B#黄泉}她{RUBY_E#}是一位令使，也不应该……
t_en: "Ascends to godhood once more"... even if {RUBY_B#Acheron}she{RUBY_E#}'s an Emanator, she shouldn't...

t_ch: 久远的往事就此浮现……
t_en: A distant past resurfaced...

t_ch: 今天过后，耶佩拉的名字就会从银河历史中消失，而永火官邸将取而代之，在不远的未来收到一封邀请函……
t_en: After today, Jepella's name will disappear from cosmic history, and the Ever-Flame Mansion will take its place. In the not-too-distant future, you'll receive an invitation...

t_ch: 那就是你的下一站。
t_en: That's your next stop.

t_ch: 梦想之地，匹诺康尼。
t_en: Land of the Dreams, Penacony.

t_ch: 祝你在那里找到想要的答案…或者，解脱。
t_en: I hope you find whatever you seek there, be it answers... or salvation.

t_ch: 谢谢，也希望……
t_en: Thanks, I hope...

t_ch: 咦…电话？这种时候……
t_en: Huh... a phone call? At a time like this...

t_ch: 你可以拒绝他的，你知道我在说什么。
t_en: You can turn him down. You know what I mean.

t_ch: 可艾利欧说，我就是最合适的人选。
t_en: But Elio said I'm the perfect candidate.

t_ch: 人选？艾利欧终于得到结论了？
t_en: Candidate? So Elio finally came to a conclusion?

t_ch: 嗯，他说自己看清了第四种命运，不会再有其他意外。他也将我选为了「最后的幸存者」，就像{NICKNAME}那样。
t_en: Yes, he said he saw the fourth fate clearly, and there won't be any more surprises. He also chose me as the "Last Survivor," just like {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 是哪一条命途？
t_en: Which Path is it?

t_ch: 「虚无」。在它淹没一切后，我必须成为幸存的最后一人，倾尽所有，力挽狂澜。
t_en: The Nihility. After it engulfs everything, I must be the last survivor, giving my all to turn the tide.

t_ch: 真狠心啊。
t_en: How ruthless.

t_ch: 不过，和其他三位稍有不同。在那之前，我还有其他事需要留心。
t_en: However, it's a bit different from the other three. Before that, I have other matters that need my attention.

t_ch: 只要做得到，我必须避免{NICKNAME}沾染「虚无」的力量，哪怕一分一毫。毕竟，{F#她}{M#他}背负着的一切，不但更沉重，也更珍贵。
t_en: If possible, I must prevent {NICKNAME} from being tainted by the power of Nihility, even the slightest trace of it. After all, everything {F#s}he carries is not only heavier, but also more precious.

t_ch: 「只要做得到」，这可有点模糊。
t_en: "If possible" is a bit vague.

t_ch: 我想，必要的时候……
t_en: I suppose, if it comes to that...

t_ch: 即使必须为之而死，我也不能逃开。
t_en: Even if I have to die for it, I cannot run away.

t_ch: 在艾利欧预见的「未来」里，我们不曾拥有「结局」。但我还有机会，从命运手中…夺回「开启」的权利。
t_en: In the "future" that Elio foresaw, we never had an "ending." But I still have a chance... to wrestle back from fate the right to have a "beginning."

t_ch: 此后不久 白日梦酒店
t_en: Not long after, at The Reverie Hotel...

t_ch: 你在现实中的客房倒是意外朴素……
t_en: Your guest room in reality is surprisingly modest...

t_ch: …就像你的外在一样，黄泉小姐。
t_en: ...An aesthetic you share, Miss Acheron.

t_ch: 得来全不费工夫。就是这只八音盒——泯灭帮收到的「邀请函」……
t_en: It's a cinch. This music box, the "invitation" received by the Annihilation Gang... There are latent memories that linger on it yet.

t_ch: 有关你的记忆不只属于你——我所知甚多，亦预言更远——只要用点手段，死者也能开口说话。
t_en: You see, memories of you are not yours alone. They travel in other people... Other things. I know much, and I can predict even more. With some help, the dead can be made to speak.

t_ch: 泯灭帮，那群遇见你后便不知去向的亡命徒…他们究竟经历了什么？让我来揭示吧。
t_en: The Annihilation Gang, that band of desperadoes who all disappeared after meeting you... What exactly happened to them? Well, let me reveal all.

t_ch: 「…十二刻度██十二梦境██父亲██我把它献予你…」
t_en: "...Gradation twelve ██ Dreamscape twelve ██ Father ██ I dedicate this to you..."

t_ch: 「…做得好██杜布拉██无论他们逃往何处██泯灭终将造访…」
t_en: "...Well done ██ Dubra ██ wherever they go, ██ shall be met by annihilation..."

t_ch: …有了，尽管很朦胧，但这是阿弗利特的声音。另一位…是他的子嗣吧。
t_en: ...There it is. It's hazy, but it's Ifrit's voice. The other one... is probably his progeny.

t_ch: 「…火焰的子嗣们██这是你们的成人之礼…」
t_en: "Children of the flame ██ this marks your rite of passage."

t_ch: 「…轮不到她出场████我一人便足够…」
t_en: "She won't be necessary ████ I alone am enough."

t_ch: 「永火官邸」启程了，可怜的人们…他们还不知道等待在前方的是什么。
t_en: The Ever-Flame Mansion has set out on a journey. Those poor people... They have no idea what lies in wait ahead of them.

t_ch: 但记忆的复现很顺利，她要来了…很快就要来了…这里没有别人，不那么优雅也可以…我得不遗余力……
t_en: Memory recovery is going well, but slowly. She'll be here soon, and time is short.... There's nobody else here, so there's no need to be delicate... In fact I think I'd better go all out....

t_ch: …怎么回事？
t_en: ...What happened?

t_ch: 之后的记忆…是一片空白？怎么可能…这只八音盒落入黄泉之手，被她带来匹诺康尼是事实，本该这样的…可中间的过程……
t_en: The memory after that... is blank? How is that possible... This music box fell into Acheron's hands, and she brought it to Penacony. That's a fact, and that's how it should have gone... but along the way...

t_ch: …就像是被谁抹去了？谁做的……
t_en: ...It's like it's been erased? Who's done this...
"...Who are you?"

t_ch: …这是？
不对——这不是一段「记忆」？
t_en: No. Is this not a "memory"?

t_ch: 「哦…一位忆者，你侍从流光忆庭…还是焚化工？」
t_en: "Oh... a Memokeeper. Do you serve the Garden of Recollection... or The Cremators?"

t_ch: 「我的名字是康士坦丝…很高兴认识你。我们本该在匹诺康尼相遇，共度一段…*刻骨铭心*的时光。」
t_en: "My name is Constance... A pleasure to meet you. We were supposed to meet in Penacony and spend an... unforgettable time together."

t_ch: 「但那似乎无法实现了。宴会之星并不欢迎大丽花，我也不需要成人礼…而你，我知道你在寻找什么……」
t_en: "But that seems unrealistic. Dahlia's not welcome on the Banquet Star, and I don't need a coming-of-age ceremony... And you, I know what you're looking for..."

t_ch: 「想要{RUBY_B#黄泉}『她』{RUBY_E#}的秘密？我可以给你，然后…替我享受那场盛会吧。」
t_en: "Want {RUBY_B#Acheron}'her'{RUBY_E#} secret? I can give it to you, and then... you can enjoy the banquet for me."

t_ch: 「祝你留下『难忘』的回忆。」
t_en: "I wish you 'unforgettable' memories."

t_ch: 不必装神弄鬼了，我非常确信，你并非远在千里之外。
t_en: Cut the mystical act. I'm absolutely certain you're not thousands of miles away.

t_ch: 在那片原始忆域，我的感知处处受阻，原以为是家族的原因，结果，却是有位同僚在场？你是因何而来？
t_en: In that Primordial Memory Zone, my acuity was blocked at every turn. I thought it was because of The Family, but it turns out there was a colleague present. What brings you here?

t_ch: 还真是咄咄逼人呢。是已然进退失据，还是猜到了些什么？「永火官邸」的康士坦丝，又能是为何而来？
t_en: My, how aggressive. Are you backed into a corner, or have you figured something out? What could bring Constance of the Ever-Flame Mansion here?

t_ch: 那正是你的破绽，陌生的焚化工——泯灭帮习惯于抛头露面，它的成员从无神秘之处。而冥火大公，<color=#dbc291ff>从未有过名为康士坦丝的子嗣。</color>
t_en: That's your fatal flaw, mysterious Cremator. The Annihilation Gang has always operated in plain sight, with no secrets among its members. And Duke Inferno <color=#dbc291ff>has never had an offspring named Constance</color>.

t_ch: 哦？你确定？如果…只是我太过「善变」，忍不住会叛离任何人呢？
t_en: Oh? Are you so sure? What if... I'm just too "capricious" and can't help but betray anyone?

t_ch: 这不可能，反物质军团一直都在找{RUBY_B#大丽花}她{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: That's impossible, the Antimatter Legion has been after {RUBY_B#The Dahlia}her{RUBY_E#} this whole time.

t_ch: 你们不是也一样吗？为了将我抹去，流光忆庭进行过十四次追缉，而最后那一次，我明明死在了你的面前，对吧？
t_en: Aren't you the same? The Garden of Recollection launched fourteen pursuits trying to erase me, and in that final one, I died right in front of you, didn't I?

t_ch: 真的是你……
t_en: It really is you...

t_ch: 打断别人的叙旧，可真够没风度的。不过，请便——
t_en: To interrupt another's reunion... such a graceless act. But by all means...

t_ch: 在此之后，我们再来好好谈谈你的忘恩负义，亲爱的「狱友」。
t_en: After this, we'll have ourselves a nice long talk about your ingratitude, my dear "cellmate."

t_ch: 这是「邀请函」最初被交付时残留的记忆…片刻就中断了。那么之后是……
t_en: This is the residual memory from when the 'invitation' was first delivered... they were abruptly interrupted. Then, what happened next is...

t_ch: 「…他们躲入睡乡██但求安眠不被风雨搅扰…」
t_en: "...They sought refuge in the land of sleep ██, merely wishing for undisturbed rest, away from the storms..."

t_ch: 「…嘘████行于██毁灭██的亡命徒██什么时候怕过死亡…」
t_en: Shh—████ when have those ██ on the Path of Destruction ██ feared death?

t_ch: 是那只忆域迷因，当心些。
t_en: It's that Memory Zone Meme. Be careful.

t_ch: 那是？！流萤，我们过去看看。
t_en: What's that!? Firefly, let's go and check it out.

t_ch: 这方面，你才是专家呢。不过，我一直以为，使用那份力量会让你…惆怅万分。
t_en: When it comes to this, you're the expert. Yet I'd always imagined that calling upon that power would make you... profoundly melancholic.

t_ch: …现在没有，以后也不会。
t_en: ...I'm not now, and never will be.

t_ch: …还真够不小心呢，很像一位老朋友。
t_en: ...Pretty careless indeed, just like an old friend of mine.

t_ch: 乐园终将跌入愁苦人世
t_en: Paradise shall fall into this world of sorrow

t_ch: 黎明一旦升起
t_en: And once dawn breaks

t_ch: 便要坠毁于白昼
t_en: It will shatter in the light of day

t_ch: 凡是金的
t_en: How could anything golden

t_ch: 怎可能光华长留？
t_en: Abide in glory forever?

t_ch: 什么动静都没有…难道已经离开了？
t_en: There's no sign of anything... could it have already left?

t_ch: 嗯？表情有些奇怪呢。在此之前，我总是对这一刻的到来，感到紧张——总担心你会认为我有些可怕。
t_en: Hm? That's a peculiar look on your face. Before this, I was always anxious about this moment, always afraid you might find me frightening.

t_ch: 你也参与了行动？
t_en: You were involved too?

t_ch: 当然，匹诺康尼的一切，比你认为的还要重要。
t_en: Of course, everything about Penacony is more important than you think.

t_ch: 为了避免其他糟糕的走向，星核猎手必须投入如此多的力量。
t_en: To prevent other terrible outcomes, the Stellaron Hunters were forced to use great power.

t_ch: 是挺可怕的。
t_en: That's pretty terrifying.

t_ch: 如果你愿意，也能够承受…我倒是可以一以贯之呢。还是说……
t_en: If you're willing, and if you can endure it... I can keep going. Or perhaps...

t_ch: 你更愿意，享受我的「双重标准」？
t_en: ...you would prefer to indulge in my "double standards?"

t_ch: 你认识黑天鹅？
t_en: You know Black Swan?

t_ch: 嗯，相当「亲密」，别因为我那时的说法误会。
t_en: Yeah, we were quite "close." Don't get the wrong idea from how I phrased it back then.

t_ch: 我一直认为，两个正用匕首死斗的人，互相将刀尖抵住对方脖子的那一刻，要比寻常的舞伴更加亲近。
t_en: I've always thought that when two people are locked in a knife fight, with their blades pressed to each other's throats, they become more intimate than any pair of dancers.

t_ch: 没什么，继续吧。
t_en: Never mind, let's continue.

t_ch: 现在，让我们把视线，投向命运的某个交汇之处吧——
t_en: Now, let's turn our gaze to where the threads of destiny intertwine...

t_ch: 此后不久，你终于知道了黑天鹅的意图，她与公司进行交易，将你带到了砂金的面前。为了收复匹诺康尼，公司一直在寻找暂时的盟友。
t_en: Soon after, you finally learned Black Swan's intentions: She made a deal with the IPC to bring you before Aventurine. In order to reclaim Penacony, the IPC had been seeking temporary allies.

t_ch: 作为最初的诚意，他向你展示了自己的发现——那个由愚者伪造的「知更鸟遇害」现场。
t_en: As a show of initial sincerity, he revealed his discovery to you: The crime scene of "Robin's death" that was staged by the Fool.

t_ch: 自此，砂金展开了他的豪赌。
t_en: From that moment on, Aventurine embarked upon his great gamble.

t_ch: 不惜敲碎重如生命的基石，他以诡计骗过星期日，换来了押上一切的机会。
t_en: Willing to shatter the Cornerstone as precious as life itself, he deceived Sunday with his schemes, earning himself a chance to risk it all.

t_ch: 惊人的重注，让他如愿引动了令使的一刀。家族苦心隐瞒的秘密因此暴露，身处漩涡中心的你，也坠入其中。
t_en: With such a high-stakes gamble, he succeeded in provoking the Emanator's strike. The Family's carefully guarded secret was exposed, and you, caught in the eye of the storm, were pulled into the chaos.

t_ch: 但这都是生者们的故事，与此同时，「死者」的世界又会如何？
t_en: But that's all about the living. In the same moment, what became of those within the world of the "dead?"

t_ch: 那位知更鸟小姐，先你一步抵达了流梦礁。面对她的却非豪赌时的未知……
t_en: Miss Robin arrived at Dreamflux Reef ahead of you. But what awaited her wasn't the uncertainty of a gamble...

t_ch: 而是注定的生，与注定的死。
t_en: But rather a destined life, and a destined death.

t_ch: 哥哥的话，我不明白…对小鸟来说，飞翔…也需要问「为什么」吗？
t_en: Brother, I don't understand... For a bird, does flying... also need a "why"?

t_ch: 既然要由我们来决定，是否把它放归天空，那我们就得为此负责。
t_en: Since it falls to us to decide whether to release it back to the sky, we must take responsibility for that choice.

t_ch: 好像歌斐木先生的语气……
t_en: That really sounds like Mr. Gopher Wood...

t_ch: 不过…我决定了。
t_en: But... I've made up my mind.

t_ch: 让它自由自在地飞翔吧。
t_en: Let it soar free and wild.

t_ch: 如果我有和它一样的羽毛和翅膀，一定会想飞翔，哪怕只是试一试。
t_en: If I had feathers and wings like it does, I'd definitely want to fly, even if just to try it once.

t_ch: 再说啦，哥哥会帮它的，对吧？
t_en: Besides, Big Brother will help it, right?

t_ch: 可是……
t_en: But...

t_ch: 临别之际，能听到这样的话，真令人安心。星期日，妹妹可要走到你的前面去了。
t_en: It's truly reassuring to hear such words before parting. Come, Sunday, your little sister will be walking ahead of you now.

t_ch: 歌斐木先生？您怎么…
t_en: Mr. Gopher Wood? How did you...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>15</unbreak>█神明赐予我们天火，也赐予我们神圣的磨难。便令它们存在吧，你我皆属凡人，生来便要去爱，去受痛苦。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>15</unbreak>█The gods bestowed upon us heavenly fire, and with it divine tribulations. Let them be, for we are all mortals, born to love and to suffer."</color>

t_ch: 今日，不止一只小鸟将要远行——在你启程的时刻，我又怎能缺席？
t_en: Today, more than one little bird will embark on their long journey. How could I miss the moment of your departure?

t_ch: 过来吧孩子，我为你准备了「临别之礼」。
t_en: Come here, child. I've prepared a "farewell gift" for you.

t_ch: …她给了你什么？
t_en: ...What did she give you?

t_ch: 知更鸟小姐？
t_en: Miss Robin?

t_ch: 抱歉，我说到哪里了？
t_en: Sorry, where was I?

t_ch: 在筑梦边境，一位假面愚者袭击了您，并且留下了一份临别之礼。
t_en: In Dream's Edge, a Masked Fool attacked you and left behind a parting gift.

t_ch: 也很难说是礼物——愚者将我杀死时，为我戴上了一副假面。
t_en: Though it's hard to call it a gift. When the Fool killed me, they put a mask on my face.

t_ch: 可我在流梦礁醒来后，它不见了，也感受不到任何影响。
t_en: But when I woke up in Dreamflux Reef, it was gone, and I couldn't feel any effects from it.

t_ch: 「属于你的那一副，真的叫做同谐么？嗯？秩序的双子？」
t_en: "As for that mask of yours... is it really called the Harmony? The Twin of the Order?"

t_ch: 她或许在暗示什么，但我还猜不透她的用意。
t_en: She might be hinting at something, but I still can't figure out what she means.

t_ch: 如此说来，您身上的异常，现在怎么样了？
t_en: Speaking of which, how's that anomaly of yours doing now?

t_ch: 已经在渐渐恢复了。不可否认，流梦礁同样在传扬「同谐」，并且没有受到家族叛徒的影响。
t_en: I'm gradually getting better. There's no denying that Dreamflux Reef also spreads the Harmony, and it hasn't been affected by The Family's traitor.

t_ch: 至于我的失声，我仍然需要继续追查。也许，我的确一直戴着面具，而又不自知。
t_en: As for my loss of voice, I still need to keep investigating. Perhaps I've been wearing a mask all along without even realizing it.

t_ch: 需要什么帮助的话，请尽管开口。
t_en: If you need any help, just say the word.

t_ch: 多亏您伸出援手，我对这里已经熟悉起来了。
t_en: Thanks to your help. I'm starting to get familiar with this place.

t_ch: 不过流梦礁与世隔绝，在这里有什么方法能知道外面的情况吗？我想确认一下哥哥的状况。
t_en: But Dreamflux Reef is so isolated... Is there any way to know what's happening outside? I want to check on my brother's situation.

t_ch: 这不难，找个热闹的地方就行，需要我带路吗？
t_en: That's easy! Just head to where all the action is. Want me to show you the way?

t_ch: 就让我自己走走吧，多谢，米凯先生。
t_en: I'll take a walk around by myself, thanks, Mr. Micah.

t_ch: 对了，打听消息的时候，记得留心分辨，偶尔也会有些谣言。
t_en: Oh, and when you're gathering intel, remember to sort fact from fiction. Rumors do pop up from time to time.

t_ch: 我会留心的，多谢提醒。
t_en: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks for the heads-up.

t_ch: …知更鸟小姐？听得见吗？
t_en: ...Miss Robin? Can you hear me?

t_ch: 这个声音……
t_en: That voice...

t_ch: 在这边——
t_en: Over here...

t_ch: 你是…流萤小姐？
t_en: Are you... Miss Firefly?

t_ch: 果然，你早就注意到我了。抱歉，我现在不方便抛头露面，能请你借一步说话吗？
t_en: So you did notice me after all. Sorry, but I can't show myself right now. Could we talk somewhere more private?

t_ch: 实话说，我没有相信你的理由。
t_en: To be honest, I have no reason to trust you.

t_ch: 我明白，但我可以向你保证，这不是一个陷阱。如果一定需要理由……
t_en: I get it, but I can assure you this isn't a trap. If you really need a reason...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>十二时刻存在异常，我们怀疑「梦主」的真面目。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>There are anomalies in the Twelve Hours. We are suspicious of the Dreammaster's true identity.</color>

t_ch: 请带路吧，但事先说明：同意见面不代表我的任何态度。
t_en: Lead the way, but let me be clear: agreeing to meet doesn't imply anything about my stance.

t_ch: 理解，我的同伴会为你引路。
t_en: Understood, my companion will show you the way.

t_ch: 流萤小姐？你可以现身了。
t_en: Miss Firefly? You can show yourself now.

t_ch: 抱歉，还差一些，我的同伴马上会把你带来这边。
t_en: Sorry, just a moment. My companion will bring you this way shortly.

t_ch: 这边？
t_en: This way?

t_ch: （这里是……）
t_en: (Where... is this...)
